serial.description: A close-up shot shows a young man in a red hooded jacket looking at another person whose back is to the camera. The person in the foreground is holding a gun pointed at the man in red. The background is out of focus, showing a colorful wall and another figure in a red suit with a black mask.
serial.explanation: The frame shows a single, continuous scene with no multiple video streams or split-screen elements, so it is not sludge content.
